name: Polymorph
description: This spell transforms a creature that you can see within range into a new form. An unwilling creature must make a Wisdom saving throw to avoid the effect. A shapechanger automatically succeeds on this saving throw. The transformation lasts for the duration, or until the target drops to 0 Hit Points or dies. The new form can be any Beast whose Challenge Rating is equal to or less than the target's (or the target's level, if it doesn't have a Challenge Rating). The target's game statistics, including mental ability scores, are replaced by the statistics of the chosen Beast, but it retains its alignment and personality. The creature is limited in the actions it can perform by the nature of its new form, and it can't cast spells. The target's gear melds into the new form.
